subject: fix(cssColor): drop null argument to debugLog — TS2345 build break on Vercel
body:
The previous commit passed `null` to debugLog's 4th parameter, but the
parameter type is `details?: string` (optional string, not nullable).
`tsc --noEmit` run locally during the risk-pass commit didn't flag it
— `tsc -b` (build mode, as Vercel runs) did. The fourth argument is
optional; omit it rather than pass null.

Build verified locally with `npm run build` (tsc -b && vite build) —
matches Vercel's invocation.

Tags: build, typescript, cssColor
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: alpha-debug-system
Semver: patch
